subject: [CCSDK] Correct permissions of mounted configmaps
commit_message:
[CCSDK] Correct permissions of mounted configmaps

One configmap contains scripts that need to be executable.
It turns out that by mistake such file permissions were granted
to wrong volume by mistake.

Issue-ID: CCSDK-2958
Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>
Change-Id: If02b4579981bcf3ba52304013f3be4ec43e2672c

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-guilin-commit-lint/59/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-guilin-commit-lint/59/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-guilin-commit-lint/59/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-guilin-commit-lint/59
